title: Started Learning Programming
details: Began exploring Python and web development basics through online courses and small coding challenges.
achievements: Learned HTML, CSS, and JavaScript basics

title: Built First Web App
details: Created a basic web app using Flask and React to track learning progress. Learned about REST APIs and frontend integration.

title: Explored NLP and AI
details: Experimented with text classification, named entity recognition, and chatbot development using Hugging Face Transformers.

title: Internship in AI Engineering
details: Worked on developing NLP pipelines, fine-tuning transformer models, and integrating APIs into scalable backend systems.

title: Developed AI Portfolio Project
details: Created an AI-powered interactive portfolio website using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and open-source models.
achievements: Built full RAG pipeline with vector search
Designed project explorer with scoped chat
